effect.name: Barry's Satan Maximiser
effect.description:
Barry's Satan Maximiser (LADSPA 1408)
Compresses signals with a stupidly short attack and decay, infinite ratio and hard knee. Not really as a compressor, but good harsh (non-musical) distortion.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Knee Point
parameter.comment:
Controls the knee roll-off point,
ie. the point above which the compression kicks in. 0 will have no effect, -90 will remove virtually all dynamic range.
